title: Eligibility criteria in clinical trials in breast cancer: a cohort study.
author: Szlezinger K Pogoda K Jagiello-Gruszfeld A Klosowska D Gorski A Borysowski J
content:
S-EPMC10318672 PMC10318672 Eligibility criteria in clinical trials in breast cancer: a cohort study.

Background

Breast cancer (BC) is the most common cancer type in women. The purpose of this study was to assess the eligibility criteria in recent clinical trials in BC, especially those
